code: import React from'react';import{Navigate,useLocation}from'react-router-dom';import{useAuth}from'../context/AuthContext';import Loading from'../components/common/Loading';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const PrivateRoute=_ref=>{let{children,roles}=_ref;const{isAuthenticated,loading,hasRole}=useAuth();const location=useLocation();if(loading){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Loading,{message:"Verificando autentica\xE7\xE3o..."});}if(!isAuthenticated){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navigate,{to:"/login",state:{from:location},replace:true});}if(roles&&!hasRole(roles)){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navigate,{to:"/",replace:true});}return children;};export default PrivateRoute;
